response.justification: The candidate possesses extensive senior full-stack experience, demonstrating deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, coupled with strong architectural skills and a clear focus on quality. Their recent work on AI-agent infrastructure directly aligns with a key role requirement, and their diverse background suggests rapid adaptability to new frameworks.
strengths: Over 10 years of senior full-stack development experience.
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and tooling.
Strong command of core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and cloud/containerization.
concerns: Specific experience with Nest.js is not explicitly demonstrated.
Vitest/Playwright testing frameworks not explicitly mentioned.
Limited explicit Kotlin experience, though Java is present.
